title: EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design
summary: EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design
whyItMatters: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to engineering design tasks, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not adequately address multi-agent systems that combine simulation, retrieval, and manufacturing preparation. We introduce a benchmark suite with three evaluation dimensions: (1) a workflow benchmark with seven prompt styles targetin…
